Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Navigation Protection Act (Abitibi and TÃ©miscamingue regions)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Navigation Protection Act (Abitibi and TÃ©miscamingue regions)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Navigation Protection Act in order to add lakes and rivers in the Abitibi and TÃ©miscamingue regions to the navigable waters listed in the schedule to that Act.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Part 1 of the schedule to the Navigation Protection Act is amended by adding the following after item 37:

row.entry: The lakeâs water boundary includes the mouths of all connecting waterways

Section.Text: Part 1 of the schedule to the Act is amended by adding the following after item 39:

row.entry: The lakeâs water boundary includes the mouths of all connecting waterways

row.entry: The lakeâs water boundary includes the mouths of all connecting waterways
The lakeâs water boundary includes the mouths of all connecting waterways
The lakeâs water boundary includes the mouths of all connecting waterways

row.entry: The lakeâs water boundary includes the mouths of all connecting waterways

Section.Text: Part 2 of the schedule to the Act is amended by adding the following after item 24:

row.entry: From Lake Blouin to Hudson Bay

Section.Text: Part 2 of the schedule to the Act is amended by adding the following after item 29:

row.entry: From Lake Kipawa to Lake Timiskaming
From Lake Duparquet to Dasserat Lake
From Lake Abitibi to Lake Duparquet

Section.Text: Part 2 of the schedule to the Act is amended by adding the following after item 32:

row.entry: From Lake RÃ©migny to Lake Opasatica

row.entry: From Lake Preissac to the Ottawa River

Section.Text: Part 2 of the schedule to the Act is amended by adding after item 39 in the columns shown the following:

row.entry: From Bousquet Lake to Lake Chassignole
